item.title: FDA Approves Keytruda (pembrolizumab) for Advanced Melanoma Treatment
item.description: The FDA today approved Keytruda (pembrolizumab), developed by Merck (NYSE: MRK), for the treatment of advanced melanoma. This NDA approval represents a breakthrough therapy designation.

item.title: FDA Issues Complete Response Letter for Zynquista NDA
item.description: The FDA issued a complete response letter (CRL) for the new drug application for Zynquista, citing the need for additional safety data. The drug was developed by Lexicon Pharmaceuticals.

item.title: FDA Safety Alert: Voluntary Recall of Zantac Due to NDMA Contamination
item.description: The FDA has issued a safety alert regarding the voluntary recall of Zantac (ranitidine) products due to potential NDMA contamination above acceptable levels.

item.title: Pfizer Announces Positive Phase 3 Clinical Trial Results for PF-07321332
item.description: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) announced positive Phase 3 clinical trial results for its antiviral compound PF-07321332, showing 89% efficacy in reducing hospitalization.

item.title: FDA Announces New Guidelines for Food Labeling Standards
item.description: The FDA published updated guidelines for food nutrition labeling to improve consumer awareness of added sugars and sodium content.

item.title: FDA Grants Breakthrough Therapy Designation for AbbVie's ABBV-951
item.description: The FDA granted breakthrough therapy designation for AbbVie's (NYSE: ABBV) ABBV-951 for the treatment of advanced Parkinson's disease.
